title: Craftable Elytra
description: This mod/data pack adds craftable elytras!
body:
You probably want a way to craft elytras, right? This lightweight mod brings in the an elytra recipe to the game, allowing you to feel that old Minecraft nostalgia again. It’s a great addition for survival servers or solo play to make the endgame feel rewarding again.

Features:

Recipe: Restores the recipe using 1 Nether star, 2 String, 2 Diamonds, and 2 Feathers.

Lightweight: No extra items or unnecessary code

Compatibility: Works with Forge, Fabric and NeoForge
